DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TOMMY YU (SERVICE DIRECTOR) FILED BY DEFENDANT J E H ENTERPRISES, INC DBA SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF BORIS NEMIROVSKIY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF YANA NEMIROVSKAYA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J E H ENTERPRISES, INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS TOMMY YU. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEMIROVSKIY, BORIS NEMIROVSKAYA, YANA BORISOVNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT J E H ENTERPRISES, INC DBA SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA NOTHING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
